metaDescription: Live server availability: current status per service, recent health checks, and an activity timeline.
heading: System Status
subtitle: Live server availability
overallNoChecks: No checks yet — waiting for the scheduled worker.
availabilityHint: Successful checks out of all stored checks for this server.
activityHint: Each square is one scheduled check — green means the probe succeeded, red means it failed. Newer checks are on the right.
liveUpdates: Auto-refresh every {seconds}s — no page reload needed.
liveOffline: Offline — data will refresh when you are back online.
